testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.CascadingSpeculationTest

testcase.name: miss at early level invalidates all deeper speculations
cascaded speculation has reduced confidence via decay factor
validating all cascaded speculations reports hits correctly
cascadeRollback returns 0 when no active speculations
lower decay factor limits cascade depth more aggressively
deep enough cascading eventually falls below threshold

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:27.575 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.orchestrator.PredictionModel -- Recorded outcome for classify: POSITIVE (total: 1) 08:31:27.579 [Test worker] DEBUG
